fail-reason.cant-be-shop: This building can't be a shop.
fail-reason.no-warps-in: This location has no entrance for customers.
fail-reason.warp-blocked: This location's entrance tile is not passable by customers.
fail-reason.no-reachable: This location has no walkable tiles for customers.
fail-reason.not-farm-building: You can only open a shop in farm buildings (e.g. a shed).
fail-reason.no-items-for-sale: Put out some items on tables for sale, and make sure customers can reach them.
fail-reason.green-rain: The green rain looks pretty bad out there, doubt anyone would come today.
fail-reason.too-tired: You are too tired to do any shopkeeping.
fail-reason.too-late: It's too late in the day to open a shop.
fail-reason.other-farmer: You can't open a shop while another player is in the same location.
fail-reason.tile-position: Clear the space behind the cash register (i.e. one tile above).
fail-reason.everyone-hate: No one wants to buy the things you got on display, try selling something else.
fail-reason.no-reports-to-show: There are no session reports for this location.
bonus.title: Decorate your store to sell for higher prices!
bonus.unreachable-table: WARNING: You have {{count}} unreachable tables that hold a sellable item.
theme-boost.title: Shop Themes:
upgrade.advertisement.name: Shop Advertisement Round {{nextLevel}}
upgrade.advertisement.desc:
Advertise your shop to increase the number of customers 
for each shopkeeping session
(current: {{count}})
upgrade.roboshopkeep.name: Robo-Shopkeep Firmware Lv. {{nextLevel}}
upgrade.roboshopkeep.desc:
Upgrade the Robo-Shopkeep's firmware to improve the sale price.
(current: {{count}})
upgrade.auto-restock.desc:
When auto-restock is enabled and there are chests in the shop location,
items inside will be automatically placed onto empty tables when you close the shop.
